offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate invoicing and payment tracking instead of manual tracking and invoicing processes.
problem: Inefficient tracking of payments and outstanding balances.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Participate in community forums for accounting tools
try_it: Let users try payment tracking dashboard on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing payment data
Provide one-click export for simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
